figures_checked.reason: Background/nature and application montage; the single-spine schematic is superseded by Fig. 3.
Two-dimensional precursor; retained equations and the 3D Fig. 3 provide sufficient evidence.
Irreplaceable force/angle geometry and 3D load-ratio zones. Crop visually verified with full labels, axes, legends and caption.

Minimal visual chain from concavity/MI to measured load-ratio capability. Crop visually verified.
Simple probability geometry is fully represented by E4-E5 and the variable definitions.
Monte Carlo result can be stated compactly by sample size, error direction and fitted lambda values.
Experimental fits are preserved numerically in V3-V4 and the parameter table.
Irreplaceable combined evidence for offset reachability, radius-to-size ratio and non-monotonic alpha/lambda. Crop visually verified.

omitted_sections: Most general background and robot taxonomy in the Introduction
Experimental device assembly details not affecting interpretation

uncertain_items.detail: The text first states that phi1' > phi1 makes a concave point more stable, but later assigns MI = 1 (concave) when phi' < phi. The intended implementation cannot be determined reliably from this paper alone.
The prose says experimental lambda is significantly larger, while the printed values 0.296/0.493 are smaller than 2.23/3.67. The reciprocal distances are larger experimentally.
The horizontal axis and surrounding definition indicate a dimensionless radius-to-size ratio of about 1.6, not a tip radius r0 with length units.

known_warnings: The symbol d is used for class-interval width in Eq. (11)-(12) and later again for mean distance 1/lambda; implementations must use distinct variable names.
Eq. (12) should be implemented explicitly as a point mass plus a conditional continuous tail with a stated domain and normalization.
All experimental parameters and rates are sandpaper- and rig-specific and require recalibration for fired-clay brick.
Single-spine Poisson independence is not evidence of independence among multiple spines in an array.
character_count_method: Count of CJK Unified Ideographs after excluding display-formula blocks, Markdown table rows and image-link rows; within the allowed 3500-character extension because the paper contains two independent core models plus a finite-tip reachability submodel.
